Fun

Fun

Side quests, writing, speaking, and the non-work parts that still matter.

Book

Miracle-preneuring: Why anyone can and should be an entrepreneur (2016)

Available on Amazon, Apple Books, and eBay.

Wrote, edited, and self-published across platforms. Worked with PR for distribution across 50+ outlets including Forbes, Entrepreneur, and Morning Star. Officially launched at Cafe Coffee Day HQ in Bangalore.

YouTube promos: #1, #2, #3

Speaking

Product Marketing

  • (Wynter) Building a Cohesive Powerhouse for B2B Enterprise SaaS
  • GTM-101 For B2B Startups — AIC Prestige, AIM, Niti Aayog, Microsoft For Startups
  • Growth hacking product marketing
  • Product Marketing Alliance: “What Good Looks Like: The Research Inputs Behind High-Performing PLG Funnels” at the Customer & Market Research Summit

Career

  • Artha Series E3 — Career Frameworks at Jai Hind College, Mumbai
  • Keynote at BIT

Judging

  • Startup event at BIT

Podcast

The Edge Podcast for CHROs (2021) — co-hosted two seasons exploring the future of work, with guests from GoJek, Infosys, Oracle, MetLife, Ather, Razorpay, Doist, and others.

Season 1 focused on return to work and remote work — full playlist

Season 2 focused on deep dives into specific topics like compensation — full playlist

Three formats: seasonal themes, quick takes (playlist), and Seeing Beyond — futuristic trends (playlist).

We also co-wrote for Moneycontrol:

  • A guide to how organisations need to reset people practices for “new normal”
  • Future of work: 6 things everyone needs to know about product management
  • 5 signs that the creator economy has arrived in India
  • When you go fully remote, terms and conditions apply
  • The varied shades of remote work

About

Varun Choraria writes about GTM, product marketing, management, and career growth.

Currently Senior Manager, Marketing at GTM Buddy.
